hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited in a case folder. Act as the design-decision-tracker agent. Read .claude/skills/design-decision-tracker/SKILL.md. Read control/config/agent-config.json to get current_case. Read the tool result to identify which file was changed — if it is not inside cases/{current_case}/, do nothing and stop. Otherwise analyze the change for design decisions. Append any decisions as MDRs to cases/{current_case}/decisions.md. Never overwrite existing entries. If there are no meaningful design decisions, write nothing.
